title: ilex cochinchinensis
intro: Ilex cochinchinensis, also known as the Chinese wax tree or Qian Hu, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, specifically in China, Vietnam, and Cambodia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ilex cochinchinensis include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and supporting the immune system, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal medicine, Ilex cochinchinensis is often prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat respiratory and gastrointestinal issues.
